mechanism_narrative: A flat or falling FEDFUNDS rate transmits easier financial conditions, lifts equity risk appetite, and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next 20 trading days through stronger duration demand. The signal is confirmed when FEDFUNDS is unchanged or down on the latest monthly print and CPIAUCSL is not re-accelerating.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day Treasury yield changes are positive in most periods when FEDFUNDS is flat or falling and CPIAUCSL is stable, or if the sign flips after three consecutive monthly observations.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in retail sales means stronger nominal demand and higher term premium expectations, which raises the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days. The effect is activated when RSAFS accelerates above its prior month while CPIAUCSL is also firm.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS rises month-over-month and CPIAUCSL is flat or rising
failure_condition: Reject if RSAFS upswings combined with stable or rising CPIAUCSL are followed by lower 10-day and 20-day Treasury yields more often than not over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A falling UNRATE alongside rising PAYEMS signals labor-market strength and stronger wage pressure, which lifts inflation expectations and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 20 trading days. The mechanism fails if unemployment rises or payroll growth stalls despite the same trigger.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls by at least 0.1pp over 3 months and PAYEMS rises
failure_condition: Reject if the combined UNRATE-down/PAYEMS-up condition does not produce positive 20-day Treasury yield changes in at least 55% of historical occurrences.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO after a prior soft patch signals improving real activity and greater capital demand, which raises the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 5 trading days as markets price less slack. The effect is strongest when output growth is broad-based rather than a one-month spike.
failure_condition: Reject if positive monthly changes in INDPRO do not coincide with higher 5-day Treasury yield changes more often than negative or zero changes across a full business cycle segment.

mechanism_narrative: A FEDFUNDS rate above 1.25% signals a more restrictive policy stance than the current low-rate environment and should raise the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 5 trading days through a higher expected path of short rates. The signal fails when inflation is already decelerating sharply.
failure_condition: Reject if periods with FEDFUNDS above 1.25% do not show positive next-5-day Treasury yield changes, or if the relationship disappears when CPIAUCSL growth is low.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 growth is positive and HOUST remains weak, markets infer demand is holding up while housing stays soft, which keeps long yields contained over the next 60 trading days. This predicts a lower 10-year Treasury yield because the mix favors slower inflation pass-through than stronger real growth.
failure_condition: Reject if positive GDPC1 with weak HOUST fails to produce negative 60-day Treasury yield changes in a majority of historical episodes.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-shock labor recovery, a declining UNRATE from elevated levels signals a healing labor market and stronger cyclical expectations, which raises the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 60 trading days. The effect is only active when unemployment is still above its recent local trough.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE declines for 2 consecutive months from an elevated level
failure_condition: Reject if repeated two-month declines in UNRATE from elevated levels do not precede higher 60-day Treasury yields, or if PAYEMS does not confirm the labor recovery.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS and PAYEMS both accelerate together, the economy is generating stronger nominal spending and income growth, which lifts inflation expectations and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 20 trading days. The pattern is falsified if either series improves alone without the other.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint acceleration of RSAFS and PAYEMS does not outperform either series alone in predicting positive 20-day Treasury yield changes, or if the combined signal is negative more than 45% of the time.
